title: How can I get reimbursed for a damaged package with BackShip?
bodyHtml:
If your package contained a phone and arrived damaged with a BackShip label, you’re entitled to a refund covering the cost of repairing the device. Compensation will be issued per the pre-defined repair price grid (below) and specific conditions.

You’ll need to describe the damage on the after-sales platform, and you must provide photos of:

  • Full package (all 4 sides)
  • Label on the package
  • Damage to the device


If it's a device other than a phone, or if the damage is too great, you'll be reimbursed up to 70% of the total amount.

You’ll be refunded when a Back Market agent opens a support request for your damaged product. You’ll simply need to provide photos of the damage, and they’ll handle the rest.
